_spec: Sprint 3 Wave 2 enemy AI behaviors. 3 new AI types layered on top of existing enemy stat types.
_principle: AI behavior is orthogonal to enemy stats. An enemy can be (e.g.) tank+charger or fast+shooter. AI types and state names are locked.

chase.label: 追击者
chase._note: Default behavior. All existing enemies. Direct path to player. No state machine.

visual._note: Red edge glow always visible. During AIM state, draw red dashed line from enemy toward locked direction (length=300px) as charge telegraph.

CHARGE._note: If collides with player, deal damage = base damage * 1.5 (charge attack). If collides with wall, plays small impact effect.

visual._note: Purple aura ring around enemy. Forearm sprite extended (holding weapon).

AIM._note: Aim line drawn from enemy to player current position. Lock target snapshot at end of AIM state.

projectile._note: Damage = playerATK * 0.5 (per PM, mid of 30%-80% range)

visual._note: Cyan rune circle rotating under feet. During CAST state, rune pulses brighter.

DRIFT.transitionCondition: owned_minions < hardLimit AND not in cooldown
DRIFT._note: Per PM 2026-04-11: consume moveSpeedMultiplier (numeric) at runtime; moveSpeed (string) is design-intent annotation only, do NOT eval.

constraints._pmRequirement: Per PM strict constraint (risk 4 mitigation): summoner._minionCount must never exceed 6. When summoner dies, all owned minions take -50% maxHp damage immediately.

deathPenalty._note: When summoner dies, iterate owned minions and apply hp -= maxHp * 0.5

spawnRules._doc: How AI types are assigned to spawned enemies. Layered on top of existing makeEnemy() spawn logic.

exclusions._doc: Enemy stat types that cannot have certain AI
exclusions._note: Bosses keep their custom AI from updateBossAbilities(). Treasure goblin keeps flee behavior.

_knownGaps._note: AI state machine runs server-side in multiplayer. Client only renders visual telegraph. Same epic as Phase 2 sync gap.
